resources.string:
DayFlow Privacy Policy

 1) Information We Collect
 We may collect basic information such as name and email (if you provide it).

 2) How We Use Information
 We use your information to improve app experience and personalize features.

 3) Data Storage
 Your tasks and preferences may be stored locally on your device.

 4) Sharing
 We do not sell your personal data. We do not share it with third parties without your consent.

 5) Security
 We take reasonable steps to protect your data, but no method is 100% secure.

 6) Changes
 This policy may be updated in future versions.

 Contact
 If you have any questions, contact us at: support@dayflow.app
